channel.title: Scaleway on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in Scaleway on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Managing IAM Policies and API Keys
item.description: How to create Scaleway IAM policies, applications, and API keys for use with Plakar Control Plane.

item.title: Setting up HTTPS access to Plakar Control Plane on a Scaleway Private Network
item.description: Learn how to deploy Plakar Control Plane on a Scaleway Private Network and expose it securely over HTTPS using a Scaleway Load Balancer with a SSL certificate.
